'''âf-m-l''' ('''kafamal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moat|moat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moat|moat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-l
|-
! Lemma
| kafamal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamal|thifamal]] || [[word:jifamal|jifamal]] || [[word:shifamal|shifamal]] || [[word:kifamal|kifamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamal|thuthufamal]] || [[word:jujufamal|jujufamal]] || [[word:shushufamal|shushufamal]] || [[word:kukufamal|kukufamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamal|thufamal]] || [[word:jufamal|jufamal]] || [[word:shufamal|shufamal]] || [[word:kufamal|kufamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamal|thufamal]] || [[word:jufamal|jufamal]] || [[word:shufamal|shufamal]] || [[word:kufamal|kufamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamal|thefamal]] || [[word:jefamal|jefamal]] || [[word:shefamal|shefamal]] || [[word:kefamal|kefamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamal|thothofamal]] || [[word:jojofamal|jojofamal]] || [[word:shoshofamal|shoshofamal]] || [[word:kokofamal|kokofamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamal|thofamal]] || [[word:jofamal|jofamal]] || [[word:shofamal|shofamal]] || [[word:kofamal|kofamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamal|thofamal]] || [[word:jofamal|jofamal]] || [[word:shofamal|shofamal]] || [[word:kofamal|kofamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfamal|thĂŠfamal]] || [[word:jĂŠfamal|jĂŠfamal]] || [[word:shĂŠfamal|shĂŠfamal]] || [[word:kĂŠfamal|kĂŠfamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamal|thathafamal]] || [[word:jajafamal|jajafamal]] || [[word:shashafamal|shashafamal]] || [[word:kakafamal|kakafamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamal|thafamal]] || [[word:jafamal|jafamal]] || [[word:shafamal|shafamal]] || [[word:kafamal|kafamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamal|thafamal]] || [[word:jafamal|jafamal]] || [[word:shafamal|shafamal]] || [[word:kafamal|kafamal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafamal|shafamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamal|goshafamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamal|gokishafamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamalnĂŒ|shafamalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamalnknĂŒ|goshafamalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamalnĂŒ|gokishafamalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamalshĂ«|shafamalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamalnkshĂ«|goshafamalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamalshĂ«|gokishafamalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamalro|shafamalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamalnkro|goshafamalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamalro|gokishafamalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamalmu|shafamalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamalnkmu|goshafamalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamalmu|gokishafamalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamalsher|shafamalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamalnksher|goshafamalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamalsher|gokishafamalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamalng|shafamalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamalnkng|goshafamalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamalng|gokishafamalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamalya|shafamalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamalnkya|goshafamalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamalya|gokishafamalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamalyam|shafamalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamalnkyam|goshafamalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamalyam|gokishafamalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamalnĂŒshĂ«|shafamalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafamalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafamalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamalnĂŒro|shafamalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamalnknĂŒro|goshafamalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamalnĂŒro|gokishafamalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamalnĂŒmu|shafamalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamalnknĂŒmu|goshafamalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamalnĂŒmu|gokishafamalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamalshĂ«nĂŒ|shafamalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafamalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafamalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamalshĂ«ro|shafamalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamalnkshĂ«ro|goshafamalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamalshĂ«ro|gokishafamalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamalshĂ«mu|shafamalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamalnkshĂ«mu|goshafamalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamalshĂ«mu|gokishafamalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamalronĂŒ|shafamalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamalnkronĂŒ|goshafamalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamalronĂŒ|gokishafamalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamalroshĂ«|shafamalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamalnkroshĂ«|goshafamalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamalroshĂ«|gokishafamalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamalromu|shafamalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamalnkromu|goshafamalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamalromu|gokishafamalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamalmunĂŒ|shafamalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamalnkmunĂŒ|goshafamalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamalmunĂŒ|gokishafamalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamalmushĂ«|shafamalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamalnkmushĂ«|goshafamalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamalmushĂ«|gokishafamalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamalmuro|shafamalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamalnkmuro|goshafamalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamalmuro|gokishafamalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
